rationale: Large Kotlin refactor PR matching the body's claims. Deletions: rust/{NativeIk,NativeMesh,NativeStats,NativeSoftbody}.kt are deleted (JNI wrappers nobody called); anim/MorphAccumulator.kt deleted; physics/Softbody.kt deleted; live2d/{L2dKeyframe,L2dSmoothing,L2dMask,L2dNetSync}.kt deleted. Consolidations: per-package single-class files are merged into per-package units while preserving class FQNs — math/{Vec3,Vec4,Quat,Mat4,AABB}.kt are removed/folded into math/Math.kt; api/{ModelFormats,BuiltinFormats}.kt and other api files collapse into api/ModelApi.kt; core/{MeshData,MorphTarget,NodeGraph,SceneData,Transform,Vertex}.kt collapse into core/Scene.kt + BonePose.kt + AnimClip.kt; client/{Blaze3dRuntime,ClientInit,MemoryPressureMonitor}.kt collapse into ClientRuntime.kt with the MemoryPressureMonitor.kt → ClientRuntime.kt git rename preserving history. async/RenderWorker.kt → AsyncRuntime.kt git rename. Symbol-level deletions in BlazeNative (101→65 declarations) match the body's enumerated JNI removal list. The body explicitly notes Fabric entrypoint `cn.chen.blaze3d.client.ClientInit` FQN is preserved (class moved file but identifier kept). Pure shape/size cleanup as advertised — no behavior change, git renames where possible, and only-self-referenced dead code removed. Substantial refactor with consistent intent.
